houseRules.turnLoop: narrate -> resolve via engine -> reconcile state

inventory.note: Iron seal of the Vellmark Trading Company. The only thing left of the convoy.

vector.goal: Expose the conspiracy publicly — sunlight, not a quiet deal or a body in a ditch
vector.secret: The threshold has an informant in Crale's market committee; she suspects who but can't prove it
vector.voice: Direct, hands busy when nervous, asks before she gives anything
vector.attitude: wary-ally — Aldric's token is proof she needs, but she doesn't trust his judgment yet

vector.goal: Know whether her husband's death was an accident — and what the ledger means
vector.secret: She gave a 'company auditor' full access to Caspar's workshop records; they were threshold agents erasing traces
vector.voice: Soft-spoken, deflects with hospitality, becomes precise and careful when she commits to a statement
vector.attitude: fearful-and-desperate — has been watched since the auditor visit; needs protection but doesn't understand from what

vector.goal: Disappear cleanly — will trade information for a head start and a closed mouth
vector.secret: He specified the Hollow Road route for Aldric's convoy on a separate payment; doesn't know why Aldric survived
vector.voice: Charming, self-deprecating humor, never holds eye contact when Vellmark comes up
vector.attitude: transactional — sees Aldric as a threat he might be able to make useful

vector.goal: Help patients without becoming a target — caught between duty and the survival instinct
vector.secret: Has been reporting unusual injuries to a civic contact he trusts; that contact may be compromised
vector.voice: Professorial, reaches for medical terminology, genuinely curious about anomalies, uses clinical distance to deflect alarm
vector.attitude: professionally-helpful, growing alarmed — already deeper in this than he intended

what-happened-on-the-road.objective: Find out what destroyed the Vellmark convoy on the Hollow Road
what-happened-on-the-road.clue: Aldric is the only survivor and doesn't remember the final hour
what-happened-on-the-road.stake: Truth, and whatever is still out there on the road

vellmark-trading-company.note: Aldric's convoy belonged to them; their fate and Aldric's debt to them are unresolved

the-missing-hour.intro: Aldric woke at Greywater Crossing with no memory of how the convoy fell
clues: Iron company token in his hand
No bodies found at the wreck
the-missing-hour.hidden: What took the convoy, and why Aldric was spared

log.summary: Session 1 complete: convoy mystery established, threshold identified as directed operation, three leads open (Sera, Corvin, the clearing)
